title: Greenputt Governing Council

{{Quote|With the confirmation and certification of consistent game-play skills of three Ambrian neeks and a Taurill named Bortis, the Greenputt Governing Council today announced the formation of the Non-Sentient Professional Greenputt Tour (NSPGT).|"Yet Another Greenputt League" reports on the new Non-Sentient Professional Greenputt Tour joining the other established tours|<ref name="HNN">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|47|sports/13314_2.html|Yet Another Greenputt League}}</ref>}}
The '''Greenputt Governing Council''' was a committee headquartered in [[Tecave City]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Cerea/Legends|Cerea]].<ref name="ballgame" /> The group oversaw the major leagues of [[greenputt]], a ball game<ref name="HNN" /> played on a field.<ref name="Twilght">''[[Planet of Twilight]]''</ref> which included the [[Professional Greenputt Tour]], the [[Female Professional Greenputt Tour]], the [[Asexual Professional Greenputt Tour]], the [[Not-Dead-Yet Professional Greenputt Tour]], and the [[Non-Limbed Professional Greenputt Tour]]. The committee had been formed by<ref name="HNN" /> [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]],<ref name="Date" /> it added the [[Non-Sentient Professional Greenputt Tour]] (NSPGT) to the list of recognized greenputt leagues after certifying the [[Taurill/Legends|Taurill]] [[Bortis]] and three [[Ambria/Legends|Ambrian]] [[Neek (creature)|neek]]s as having consistent skill in playing the sport.<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Greenputt Governing Council was first mentioned on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]] in the [[in-universe]] issue [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 47|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #47'']], published<ref name="HNN" /> on [[March 14]], [[2002]]<ref name="HNN47 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6042498|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-03-14|time=5:40 PM|archivedate=20200305125429}}</ref> and written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]].<ref name="HNN Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref>
